description:
Overview:
1. Made of high-quality material, it is soft and comfortable, non-toxic and harmless, which is safe and skin-friendly.
2. With the exquisite craft, it is beautiful and durable, wear-resistant and has a long service life.
3. It is suitable for dogs and cats and keeps your pets warm in the winter.
4. After a shower, it can help your pets to remove the fur water quickly and prevent them from being cold.
5. There are 5 colors for choosing.

Specification:
Item Type: Pet Blanket
Material: Double Sided Velvet
Feature: Durable
Color: Black, Rose Red, Blue, Grey, Coffee
Size:100x70cm/39.37x27.56
S : 60x70CM 70 grams
M : 100x70cm 120 grams
Colour :
Black paw print on the khaki bottom, white claw on black background, black claw on the gray bottom, yellow claw on the blue bottom, black claw on red bottom

Package Include:
1 x Pet blanket
